ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "team_president" TEXT /* Name of the team president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended (if applicable) */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year the salary applies to */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Salary amount for the specified year */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the salary is paid */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Any additional bonuses */,
  "performance_clause" TEXT /* Description of any performance-based clauses */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus amount */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Health insurance coverage details */,
  "retirement_plan" TEXT /* Retirement plan details */,
  "endorsements" TEXT /* Endorsement deals and amounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year for which the salary data is recorded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year (e.g., season start date) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year (e.g., season end date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the contract */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the contract */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "total_salary" REAL /* Total salary for the contract period */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., standard, performance-based) */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the contract */,
  "performance_targets" TEXT /* Specific performance targets */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties for not meeting performance targets */,
  "option_years" INTEGER /* Number of option years */,
  "option_details" TEXT /* Details of option years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_end_year FOREIGN KEY ("end_year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_start_year FOREIGN KEY ("start_year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_roster" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year the roster applies to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's status (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_roster_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_roster_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_roster_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_start_date" TEXT /* Date when access was granted */,
  "access_end_date" TEXT /* Date when access expires */,
  "last_access" TEXT /* Last date the user accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team owner, general manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary of the player over the years */,
  "salary_growth" REAL /* Growth rate of the player's salary */,
  "salary_variance" REAL /* Variance in salary from the previous year */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Player's performance rating */,
  "predicted_salary" REAL /* Predicted salary for the next year */,
  "inflation_adjusted_salary" REAL /* Salary adjusted for inflation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_trends_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
